title: Arden (disambiguation)
content:
'''Arden''' could refer to several things:

*'''[[Arden]]''', a planet in the [[Bakura system/Legends|Bakura system]].
*'''[[Arden (Rydonni Prime)|Arden]]''', a servant to [[King/Legends|King]] [[Rilvvan K'ntarr]] on [[Rydonni Prime]].
*'''[[Arden (SIS)|Arden]]''', a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[Republic Strategic Information Service]] during the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]].
*'''[[Arden House]]''', the governor's mansion in the city of [[Salis D'aar/Legends|Salis D'aar]] on Bakura.
*'''[[Arden Industries]]''', a small starship building company.
*'''[[Arden Lyn]]''', a cyborg [[Teräs Käsi/Legends|Teräs Käsi]] master.
*'''[[Deredith Arden]]''', founder and [[Prime Minister (Bakura)|Prime Minister]] of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] around [[150 BBY/Legends|150 BBY]].

{{Disambig}}

|es=Arden
}}
